goal: Add a side-effect-free Branch/PR consolidation decision layer that combines BPK branch sequencing and manually supplied PR review receipts without calling GitHub, opening PRs, merging, or changing workflows.
scope_out: Do not call GitHub, open PRs, merge branches, change workflows, change package files, or mutate git state beyond the local BPK commit.
Do not change BPK-011 or BPK-012 semantics.
claims: Branch sequencing and PR review receipt checks can be composed without external GitHub calls.
Merge remains blocked until supplied PR receipts are green and approved.
PR creation planning remains distinct from merge execution.
assumptions: PR receipts are supplied by an operator or later connector.
This block does not create or query PRs itself.
dod: The function supports PR-creation planning and merge readiness from supplied receipts.
Missing required PR receipts block merge readiness.
Focused tests cover ready PR creation, ready merge, missing receipts, and failing checks.
Review packet and anchors record the result.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: GitHub calls, PR creation, merges, workflow changes, package changes, or BPK-011/BPK-012 semantic changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-011 plans branch release order and BPK-012 evaluates manually supplied PR review receipts. BPK-023 may compose them without external side effects.
